## New Compliance Document

**Document ID:** <!-- e.g. POL-004 — check existing IDs to avoid conflicts -->
**Document type:** <!-- Policy | Procedure | Standard -->
**Domain:** <!-- financial-crimes | governance | privacy | ... -->
**Tier:** <!-- 1 (Board approval) | 2 (Committee approval) -->
**Owner:** <!-- Full name + title -->

### Purpose

<!-- One paragraph: why this document is needed -->

### Regulatory driver (if applicable)

<!-- Cite the specific law, rule, or regulatory expectation this document addresses -->

### Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] Created from the correct template (`docs/_templates/policy.md` or `procedure.md`)
- [ ] All required frontmatter fields populated (CI will validate)
- [ ] `doc_id` is unique — confirmed against existing documents
- [ ] Document placed in the correct domain folder
- [ ] `status` set to `draft` initially, updated to `in-review` before requesting approval
- [ ] Owner and reviewers listed in frontmatter
- [ ] `effective_date` and `next_review_date` set
- [ ] `retention_years` confirmed with Legal
- [ ] CODEOWNERS updated if a new domain folder was created
